subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! That which thou didst write during thy journey hath reached Us, and I have been informed of its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبلغ میثاق آنچه در سفر مرقوم نموده بودی واصل گشت و بر مضمون اطلاع یافتم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant
